name: Moscow Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the colour of the banners of medieval Muscovy
the silver horse of Saint George

description: A red field charged in the centre with Saint George the Victorious on a silver horse, wearing gold armour and a cloak, spearing a golden serpent.
history: Adopted on 3 November 2005 by the Moscow Oblast Duma; the design echoes the historic banner of Dmitry Donskoy and the regional coat of arms.

features.symbolism: red is the historic colour of the banners of the Moscow grand princes.
Saint George on a silver horse, in golden armour and cloak, slaying a serpent with a spear; the patron saint of Moscow, taken from the historic seal of the grand princes of Moscow.
